productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Contrast Oxford Black Casual Shoes
description: Colour block CT AS Contrast Oxford, as its name implies, references the conservative formal shoe. converse adds its trademark youthful twist to the piece. Neat silhouetting and simple design details on this shoe rank it high in this season's minimalist trend.  Wear this with a T-shirt that matches one colour on this shoe, and let your inner fashionista free while adding other pieces to this ensemble. UpperColour blocked canvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitFour-hole synthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fitMidsolePU midsole for impact protectionOutsoleRubber outsole with waffle patterned grooves on the forefoot and midfootDiagonal patterning all overShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
